name: input-date
title: BTInputDate
description: Click-to-open date / date-range picker. Shows a floating BTCalendar panel (via Teleport) beneath the field when clicked. Supports single-date and range modes, floating label, error/helper text, and external form validation via the exposed `validate()` method.

files.content:
export { default as BTInputDate } from './BTInputDate.vue';
export type { BTInputDateProps, BTInputDateMode } from './BTInputDate.types';
